eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 2:18 PM on AUG 1, 2019 Effective until 6:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A CANCELLATION TO AN AMBER ALERT THAT WAS ISSUED BY THE MARIES COUNTY SHERIFF�S DEPARTMENT.  IN REFERENCE TO THE AMBER ALERT ON DOMINQUE SUMMERFORD, MALE, 8 TO 11 MONTHS OLD, HE HAS BEEN LOCATED SAFE.  ALLISON SUMMERFORD, THE SUSPECT VEHICLE, AND THE SUSPECT HAVE ALSO BEEN LOCATED.  ANYONE HAVING ANY INFORMATION RELATED TO THE ABDUCTION SHOULD CONTACT THE NEAREST LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCY OR CALL THE MARIES COUNTY SHERIFF�S DEPARTMENT. If you see the suspect or vehicle, or if you have any information, immediately dial 9 1 1 to contact the nearest law enforcement agency.
